title: fagraea carnosa
intro: Fagraea carnosa, also known as the strait gardenia or the dogbane, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. The medicinal properties of Fagraea carnosa lie in its ability to stimulate the nervous system and improve circulation, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. Fagraea carnosa can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
